notes: AI-facing tile legend for the WATER tileset (128x128 scribble-style tiles, 4-column x 4-row sheet, 16 cells / 14 used). This is a SEPARATE tileset from scribble; load it with its own firstgid. GID = row*4 + col + 1 within this sheet (local). When used in a Tiled map, add the map's firstgid offset for this tileset. Tiles are black-and-white scribble line art: WATER is shown with ripple curves, GRASS with small blade tufts; the two are distinguished by texture, not color. AUTO-TILING: edge_* tiles have grass on the named side and water opposite (tags grass_<dir>/water_<dir>). outer_corner_* = a water body's rounded corner with a grass pocket in the named corner. inner_corner_* = grass with a water pocket rounding into the named corner. Compose a pond with outer corners at the four corners, edges along the sides, and water tiles in the middle. 'passable' false for all water/shore tiles; grass is passable. Place bridge/walkway tiles (from the scribble set) over water to cross.

1.name: water
1.description: Open water with rippling surface. Impassable unless bridged.
